mapper.select: SELECT id, name, category, is_disabled, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_supplier_pool WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, name, category, is_disabled, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_supplier_pool WHERE name = #{name} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_supplier_pool (id, name, category, is_disabled, create_name, create_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{category}, #{isDisabled}, #{createName}, #{createId})
mapper.update: UPDATE sp_supplier_pool SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_supplier_pool WHERE name = #{name} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_supplier_pool WHERE name = #{name} AND id != #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sp_supplier_pool SET is_disabled = #{isDisabled} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM sp_supplier_pool WHERE category IS NOT NULL AND category != '' AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY category
mapper.update:
UPDATE sp_supplier_pool SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
